Class-Monk — Female Human Monk: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 9 (-1) Constitution: 17 (+3) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 18 (+4) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Outlander Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: The Dawnfather (NG)
Ability Boosts: Strength Experience: 636844/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 60 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Athlete: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Dexterity, Strength)
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Resilient (Strength): +1 Strength
Unarmored Movement: +30 Speed in no armor
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Athlete: Has a 60' climb Speed/Standing, running long jump, and running high jump each use only 5' of movement
Unarmored Movement: Can move across vertical surfaces and liquids
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Monk (Monastic Tradition)
Feats: Alert; Athlete; Flash Recall; Magic Initiate (Warlock); Resilient (Strength) Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Monk Features: Debilitating Barrage; Deflect Missiles; Diamond Soul; Empty Body; Evasion; Extort Truth; Extra Attack; Extract Aspects; Flurry Of Blows; Ki-Empowered Strikes; Ki; Martial Arts; Mind Of Mercury; Monastic Tradition; Mystical Erudition; Patient Defense; Perfect Self; Preternatural Counter; Purity Of Body; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Religion, Stealth); Slow Fall; Step Of The Wind; Stillness Of Mind; Stunning Strike; Timeless Body (Monk); Tongue Of The Sun And Moon; Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools, any Musical Instrument); Unarmored Defense; Unarmored Movement; Way Of The Cobalt Soul; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Shortsword) Outlander Features: Language (Choose 1 from any); Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Survival); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument); Wanderer
Feature Notes:
Monastic Tradition: 1 selection
Timeless Body (Monk): Suffers no debility from aging and needs no food or water
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) -1 Insight: (wis) +10 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +1
Athletics: (str) +9 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) -1
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) -1
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) +10
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Insight; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Dulcimer; Viol
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Dwarvish; Elvish; Orc; Sylvan
Skill Notes:
Mystical Erudition: Language (Choose 3 from any)
Mind Of Mercury: Can spend 1 ki point to gain advantage on Investigation
Mystical Erudition: Can spend 1 ki point to gain advantage on Arcana, History, or Religion
Tongue Of The Sun And Moon: Can converse with any creature that understands a language
Wanderer: Has an excellent geographic memory and can forage for 6 people
Combat
Hit Points: 132 Initiative: +4 Armor Class: 13
Weapon Proficiency: Shortsword; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+9 1d10+3 B); Greatclub (+9 1d8+3 B); Spear (+9 1d10+3 P [2h d8] R20/60); Unarmed Strike (+9 1d10+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +5 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: -1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: -1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: -1
Martial Arts: When unarmored and wielding only Monk weapons, gains +0 attack and damage with unarmed strikes and weapon attacks and raises their damage dice to 1d10
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Unarmored Defense: +4 Armor Class in no armor
Alert: Cannot be surprised, and unseen foes gain no advantage on attacks on self
Debilitating Barrage: Can spend 3 ki points after hitting a target 3 times in a rd to inflict vulnerability to a chosen damage type (save Constitution negates) for 1 min and disadvantage on the target's attacks until the end of the next turn
Deflect Missiles: Can use a reaction to reduce suffered missile damage by 1d10+19 HP; reducing it to 0 HP allows spending 1 ki point to make an immediate attack with the missile
Extort Truth: Can spend 2 ki points after hitting a target 2 times in a rd to prevent it from lying (save Charisma negates) for 1 min
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Extract Aspects: Can spend 1 ki point after hitting a target 2 times in a rd to gain 4 pieces of info about it (save Constitution negates): creature type, armor class, senses, highest or lowest save modifier, condition immunities, or damage vulnerabilities, resistances, or immunities
Flurry Of Blows: Can spend 1 ki point after using an Attack action to make 2 unarmed strikes as a bonus action
Ki-Empowered Strikes: Unarmed strikes count as magical
Ki: Can use 20 ki points per short rest
Martial Arts: Can use a bonus action to make an unarmed strike after using an Attack action with an unarmed strike or Monk weapon
Mind Of Mercury: Can spend a ki point for an extra reaction
Patient Defense: Can spend 1 ki point to Dodge as a bonus action
Perfect Self: Has a minimum of 4 ki points available after initiative
Preternatural Counter: Can use a reaction after an attacker misses to make a melee attack on it
Step Of The Wind: Can spend 1 ki point to double jump distance and to Disengage or Dash as a bonus action
Stunning Strike: Can spend 1 ki point after a successful melee attack to stun the target (save DC 18 Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +9; Constitution: +9; Dexterity: +5; Intelligence: +7; Strength: +9; Wisdom: +10
Save Notes:
Diamond Soul: Proficient on all saves
Resilient (Strength): Save Proficiency (Strength)
Diamond Soul: Can spend 1 ki point to reroll a save
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Purity Of Body: Has immunity to disease and poison
Slow Fall: Can use a reaction to reduce falling damage by 100 HP
Stillness Of Mind: Can use an action to end a charmed or frightened effect on self
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: K0: 2; K: 1 Attack: K: +9; Monk: +10 Spell DC: K: 17; Monk: 18
Spells:
Arms Of Hadar (K1 Conj): (Action) 10' radius inflicts 2d6 HP necrotic and loss of reactions until the target's next turn (save Strength half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Astral Projection (Monk9 [Empty Body] Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Blade Ward (K0 Abju): (Action) Self gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing weapon damage for 1 rd
Eldritch Blast (K0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell creates 4 rays that inflict 1d10 HP force each
Magic Notes:
Empty Body: Can spend 4 ki points to become invisible and gain resistance to all damage other than force for 1 min/Can spend 8 ki points to cast Astral Projection on self
Flash Recall: Can replace a prepared spell once per short rest
Magic Initiate (Warlock): Knows 2 Warlock cantrips and can cast a chosen K1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
